headline: Senator Filibuster McBlab Reads Own Shopping List To Delay Budget Vote
summary: Colleagues now know he prefers 'chunky peanut butter' and 'generic cereal.'
fullBody: Senator Filibuster McBlab read his personal shopping list aloud for 4 hours to delay a budget vote. 'Bread,' McBlab began. 'Milk. Eggs. A questionable amount of cheese.' Colleagues now know his dietary preferences intimately. 'I didn't need to know he buys store-brand anything,' one senator whispered. The budget passed anyway. McBlab considers his shopping list 'public record' now.
